channel.title: Hotel on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Hotel on Pi Stack

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Hotel Management Software 2026: QloApps, HotelDRUID, and Alternatives
item.description: The hospitality industry has been dominated by expensive cloud-based property management systems (PMS) that charge per-room monthly fees, lock your guest data in proprietary platforms, and take commissions on every booking. Self-hosted hotel management software flips this model — you own the system, the data, and the booking engine, with zero recurring software costs.
